decisions.notes: Open-tricolor replacement canary: white and warm tan dominate the visible coat while black is restricted to one compact central saddle. Four paws remain independently readable, the belly silhouette is closed, and the tail is separated from both hind legs. Approved for one deterministic image-to-3D canary only; formal registration remains blocked on static topology, PBR, rigging, animation, GLB readback, and media QA.
